{{CargoRelic
|name=Mutated Corn
|class_id=20412
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=Cornon fight from [[Altar#Relics and Gear|Dragon Wish "Give me something to eat"]].
|description=This corn was enchanted by the Divine Dragon. Under special conditions, it could adapt to a combat form. Even if it's defeated, it would just dehydrate and shrivel up. Water it regularly and a miracle might happen someday!
|fame=26
|art=11
|fth=20
|civ=14
|tech=19
|ss1=Per 5 Wonder Fungi eaten, Snail RUSH +1<br>Wonder Fungi used: 200/200
|ss2=Per 5 Wonder Fungi eaten, Snail RUSH +2<br>Wonder Fungi used: 200/200
|ss3=Per 5 Wonder Fungi eaten, Snail RUSH +3<br>Wonder Fungi used: 200/200
|ss4=Per 5 Wonder Fungi eaten, Snail RUSH +3<br>Wonder Fungi used: 200/200
|ss7=Per 5 Wonder Fungi eaten, Snail RUSH +3<br>Wonder Fungi used: 200/200<br> (Awakened)
}}
